title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled: How a 'guess paper' leak derailed the exam and what happens next
content: NEET-UG 2026 exam has been cancelled by the National Testing Agency due to a massive "guess paper" leak, impacting over 22 lakh students. The government has ordered a CBI probe into the alleged irregularities. The re-examination dates will be announced soon, with existing registrations carrying forward. This decision aims to protect the integrity of the national examination system.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay meets AIADMK rebel leaders ahead of crucial floor test
content: Tamil Nadu faces an AIADMK internal conflict as Vijay's new government prepares for a floor test. A faction led by CV Shanmugam pledged support to Vijay, defying party directives. Agri SS Krishnamurthy warned rebel MLAs of action, while OS Manian asserted 47 MLAs back Edappadi K Palaniswami. This rift highlights deep divisions within the AIADMK following recent poll performance.

title: 'Those eyes don't lie': Krunal Pandya on Virat Kohli
content: Krunal Pandya continues to be a vital all-rounder for RCB in their IPL 2026 title defence, recently scoring a match-winning 73 despite severe cramps against Mumbai Indians. He also achieved his 100th IPL wicket and draws inspiration from Virat Kohli's unwavering intensity and dedication, having previously won Player of the Match in two IPL finals.

title: Google may have confirmed Anthropic’s Mythos fears that sent shock waves across banks
content: Cybercriminals are now leveraging AI to discover and exploit unknown software flaws, as revealed by Google's recent interception of a major attack. This development confirms fears about AI-powered hacking, prompting urgent discussions and a cautious approach to releasing advanced AI models. The cybersecurity landscape faces a new arms race as attackers gain speed.

title: Rs 10 lakh crore wiped out! Sensex tanks 1,400 points - top reasons for crash
content: One of the key triggers behind the market decline was renewed uncertainty surrounding the US-Iran conflict. US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was “on life support” after Tehran rejected Washington’s latest proposal aimed at ending the conflict. Trump described Iran’s demands as “garbage.”

title: 822/4 and a 794-run win! Cricket match produces unreal scorecard
content: In a Zimbabwe domestic cricket match, Scorpions Cricket Club achieved an astonishing 822/4, powered by centuries from Winfed Mutende (203 off 75 balls) and Takunda Madembo (302). Methane Lions collapsed to 28/7, resulting in a record 794-run victory for Scorpions. This score dwarfs previous high totals in List A cricket.

title: What next after PM Modi's appeal on gold, work from home - 10 things to know
content: PM Modi has called on citizens to adopt measures aimed at conserving foreign exchange, as the surge in oil prices triggered by the Iran conflict has intensified pressure on the rupee and strained India’s foreign exchange reserves.

title: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs and CEO Mark Zuckerberg is making priorities clear for all employees
content: Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs on May 20 as CEO Mark Zuckerberg rebuilds the company around small, AI-powered teams. With capex hitting a record $125–145 billion this year, CFO Susan Li admitted there's no clean answer for what Meta's ideal headcount even looks like anymore. The company wants builders who can ship alone what teams once built together—and is letting everyone else go.

title: Haryana Board declares Class 12 result 2026 with 84.67% pass rate as girls outperform boys
content: The Board of School Education Haryana has declared the Senior Secondary (Academic) Examination result for February/March 2026 at www.bseh.org.in. The overall pass percentage stands at 84.67%, with girls outperforming boys by 6.52%. Science recorded the highest stream-wise result at 90.08%. A total of 2,42,856 students appeared, and 2,05,618 passed. Charkhi Dadri topped district performance, while Nuh was lowest. Re-evaluation applications will remain open for 20 days after result declaration.

title: Mike Vrabel’s resurfaced Dianna Russini remark fuels affair rumor buzz
content: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s controversy intensified after an old Barstool Feud video resurfaced online amid ongoing affair rumours. In the clip, Russini answered “Kiss her” during a discussion about how “to get a woman in the mood,” prompting Vrabel to respond, “I’m paying very close attention… I’m so excited.” The viral exchange sparked fresh online speculation as fans continued revisiting past interactions, leaked photos and videos involving the Patriots coach and former NFL insider.

title: Oly medallist Sakshi speaks out on Vinesh debacle, seeks PM Modi’s help
content: Olympic medallist Sakshi Malik has backed Vinesh Phogat in her dispute with the Wrestling Federation of India over returning from retirement. Sakshi urged Prime Minister Narendra Modi and sports minister Mansukh Mandaviya to intervene, saying many countries support athletes after motherhood. Vinesh, now a Congress MLA and mother of a 10-month-old, is challenging WFI’s six-month comeback rule.

title: Amazon says AI token stats won’t affect reviews, but employees are still worried
content: Amazon employees are reportedly using an internal AI tool, MeshClaw, to artificially inflate their "token" usage. This practice stems from pressure to demonstrate AI adoption, despite Amazon's assurances that usage won't impact performance. Concerns about security and "perverse incentives" are also being raised by staff.

title: One vote, two Tirupatturs: DMK flags postal ballot mix-up after HC order
content: A single vote separated winners in a Tamil Nadu election, leading to a Madras High Court order.  The court barred a TVK MLA from voting in the assembly floor test due to a potential postal vote mix-up.  The DMK claims a recount could equalize votes, necessitating a coin toss.  The election officer cited EVM issues and postal ballot re-verification.

title: Suvendu's aide murder: Raj Singh's old video on 'violence against Hindus' surfaces
content: Raj Singh, arrested in a murder case, made inflammatory remarks in a viral video. He spoke of alleged Hindu persecution in West Bengal. Singh warned of aggressive violence if any harm came to a victim's family. The video surfaced amid political tension following his detention. Police have not commented on the video's authenticity.

title: OMCs losing Rs 1,000 crore a day: Petrol minister Puri highlights mounting losses
content: Indian consumers are shielded from soaring global crude prices, but state fuel retailers are facing immense financial strain.  Companies are losing approximately Rs 1,000 crore daily, with cumulative under-recoveries reaching nearly Rs 1.98 lakh crore. This price freeze, while ensuring supply, puts significant pressure on their balance sheets and future operations.

title: Watch: IDF shares footage of Hezbollah living quarters in underground tunnels
content: Israeli forces have released footage of Hezbollah living quarters in southern Lebanon, highlighting ongoing tensions despite a ceasefire. The IDF reported striking over 100 targets, including weapons caches and tunnel routes, amidst an escalating drone war.

title: AIADMK split on the cards? Big twist looms ahead of Vijay’s crucial floor test
content: A faction of AIADMK, led by S.P. Velumani and C.V. Shanmugam, has announced support for Chief Minister Vijay's TVK government ahead of a crucial floor test. This move comes amid internal rifts within AIADMK over potential alliances, with the faction opposing any tie-up with DMK. Vijay is working to secure the required majority with support from various parties.

title: 'Sanatana Dharma must be abolished': Udhayanidhi Stalin in Tamil Nadu assembly
content: Udhayanidhi Stalin, as Leader of Opposition in the Tamil Nadu assembly, reiterated his call for the eradication of Sanatan Dharma, stating it divides people. He also emphasized the primacy of the Tamil invocation song, "Tamil Thai Vazhthu," at all government events, demanding it not be sidelined.

title: Vijay’s astrologer, who predicted TVK victory a year ago, appointed OSD
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay has appointed astrologer Rickey Radhan Pandit Vettrivel as Officer on Special Duty (OSD) to the Chief Minister (Political). This appointment, effective from the date of joining, aims to bolster Vijay's political and administrative team. Vettrivel is known for his association with the actor-turned-politician.

title: Hidden interior design choices to keep homes cooler and beat the heat naturally
content: Cooling homes and offices effectively starts with smart material choices, not just air conditioning. Exterior louvers block sunlight, while interior surfaces like natural mineral plasters and wood regulate heat. Layered systems with breathable fabrics and cavity-backed walls improve air circulation. These subtle, considered design elements create noticeably cooler, more comfortable living and working spaces as summers intensify.

title: POCSO court sentences man to 20 years imprisonment for raping minor girl at gunpoint in Nuh
content: A significant ruling from a Nuh court has resulted in a 20-year rigorous imprisonment for a man convicted of the 2023 rape of a minor. Allegations surfaced that he abducted the young girl at gunpoint, leading to his conviction under the IPC and POCSO Act.

title: NEET (UG) 2026 exam cancelled; new dates to be announced soon
content: NEET UG 2026 cancelled: The National Testing Agency has cancelled the NEET UG 2026 examination conducted on May 3 and announced a fresh examination after inputs reviewed with central agencies and investigative findings shared by law enforcement authorities. The Government of India has also ordered a CBI inquiry into the allegations linked to the examination. NTA said no fresh registration would be required for candidates, examination fees would be refunded, and revised exam dates and admit cards would be announced separately through official channels.

title: From buying less gold to cashing it: How industry plans to cut India’s import bill
content: Facing a widening trade deficit, India's Prime Minister urges reduced gold purchases. Industry bodies propose tapping into the nation's vast household gold reserves. Their plan involves using refined household gold for domestic demand and channeling imported gold into jewellery exports via gold metal loans, aiming to boost working capital and cut imports.

title: Gold recycling after Modi's appeal: Jewellery industry says it's smarter
content: India's jewellery industry urges against curbing gold purchases, emphasizing its cultural significance as savings and tradition. Instead, they propose enhanced gold recycling and domestic mobilization to ease foreign exchange pressure. This approach aims to protect millions of livelihoods tied to the sector, from artisans to small businesses, by circulating existing gold rather than stifling demand.

title: 'Bigger theft, bigger reward': Rahul's 'chor bazaar' jab at BJP, EC over Bengal chief secy move
content: Rahul Gandhi and TMC have sharply criticised the appointment of former chief electoral officer Manoj Agarwal as West Bengal's chief secretary by the new BJP government. Critics allege this rewards Agarwal for his role in the recent Assembly elections, questioning the Election Commission's neutrality and the fairness of the polls. The BJP defends the decision, citing service rules.

title: Tamim Iqbal slams BCB for T20 WC snub: 'There was room to find solution'
content: Former captain Tamim Iqbal, now heading an interim BCB committee, expressed disappointment over Bangladesh's mishandled exclusion from the T20 World Cup 2026. He believes the previous administration failed to find a compromise with the ICC, costing the country a valuable opportunity. Tamim also emphasized the strong relationship between the BCB and BCCI, assuring India of Bangladesh's safety for future tours.

title: Mother of 'sharpshooter' Raj Singh rejects police theory in Suvendu's aide murder probe
content: The mother of alleged sharpshooter Raj Singh claims her son was in Lucknow and Ayodhya with family during the murder of Suvendu Adhikari's PA. She stated they attended a wedding in Lucknow on May 7, visited shrines in Ambedkar Nagar and Ayodhya, and were intercepted by police.

title: A mother’s liver donation gave her 17-yr-old son a second chance at life
content: A mother's love proved stronger than fear when her 17-year-old son Armaan faced acute liver failure. Renu Khanna donated a portion of her liver in a life-saving transplant at Apollo Hospitals Navi Mumbai. Doctors successfully performed the surgery, and both mother and son are now recovering. This remarkable act highlights the power of maternal sacrifice and medical expertise.

title: 'Aansu nikal jaate the': Kiara breaks down over postpartum struggles - 3 parenting lessons
content: Kiara Advani candidly shared her profound postpartum experience, describing it as a significant emotional and physical reset that reshaped her identity. She emphasized the importance of discussing postpartum struggles openly, highlighting the challenges of self-grace and maintaining one's sense of self amidst the demands of new motherhood. Advani also praised her husband Sidharth Malhotra's supportive role during this transformative period.

title: ‘Taco’ out, ‘Nacho’ in? Wall Street coins new Trump term before China visit
content: Wall Street's market sentiment has shifted from 'TACO' (Trump Always Chickens Out) to 'NACHO' (Not A Chance Hormuz Opens), reflecting growing pessimism about the Strait of Hormuz crisis. Investors now anticipate a prolonged period of elevated oil prices and shipping risks, moving away from assumptions of a quick resolution.

title: 69 days of crude, 45 days of LPG stock: Petrol minister Puri assures ‘no supply issue’
content: Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri assured stable fuel and cooking gas supplies, stating the country holds 69 days of crude oil and LNG reserves and 45 days of LPG.  Daily LPG production has been significantly increased to 54,000 tonnes amid Middle East geopolitical tensions. Puri also echoed Prime Minister Modi's call for austerity to mitigate economic pressures.

title: Sooryavanshi 'a slight liability in the field'? Former India batter flags RR
content: Sanjay Manjrekar expresses concern over Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's limited role as an Impact Player in IPL 2026. He argues that restricting the 15-year-old to just batting hinders his overall cricketing development, emphasizing the importance of fielding experience and pressure situations for a complete cricketer.

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma takes oath as Assam CM - what his cabinet looks like
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma has been sworn in as Assam's chief minister for a second term, marking a significant win for the BJP-led NDA. The grand ceremony in Guwahati was attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and other top leaders. The alliance secured a decisive victory in the recent assembly elections, reinforcing their strong hold in the northeastern state.

title: Venugopal, Satheesan or Chennithala? Cong high command steps in as Kerala CM race hits deadlock
content: The Congress-led UDF in Kerala is struggling to name its chief ministerial candidate over a week after winning the elections. Senior leaders are in Delhi for discussions, with Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge expected to make the final decision. Ramesh Chennithala, V D Satheesan, and K C Venugopal are the frontrunners amidst internal tussle and external criticism.

title: Telugu actor K Bharat Kanth passes away at 31
content: Telugu actor and digital creator K Bharat Kanth tragically died in a road accident near Hyderabad. The 31-year-old, known for his social media presence and roles in films like ‘Gramam’, lost his life when his vehicle collided with a container lorry on the Outer Ring Road. His untimely passing has deeply saddened fans and the entertainment fraternity.

title: Woman kills lover with ex’s help; son’s blood-stained notebook exposes murder plot
content: A blood-stained child's notebook, initially overlooked, became the crucial clue in a blind murder case in Madhya Pradesh. Investigators traced the handwriting and signatures to a tutor and then to a student's family, whose sudden disappearance led to their arrest.

title: Etihad clarifies no fire onboard Chennai-Abu Dhabi flight after technical issue delays departure
content: Etihad Airways flight EY343 from Chennai to Abu Dhabi returned to the gate before departure due to a technical issue, not a fire as some reports suggested. Passengers were safely disembarked. The airline confirmed emergency services were activated as per protocol and the flight is expected to depart with a delay. Passenger safety remains the top priority.

title: Tamil Nadu Government Formation LIVE Updates: Vijay Meets AIADMK ‘Rebels’ As EPS Rival Shanmugam Says "Ready To Back TVK"
content: Vijay's oath ceremony, which took place on Sunday, came after four days of protracted political negotiations after his party received an unprecedented mandate that split open the binary politics that Tamil Nadu has been witnessing for over 50 years

title: CBI Raids Punjab Vigilance Office In Mohali, 3 Arrested In Bribery Case
content: Punjab BJP President Sunil Jakhar commented on the Vigilance Department's handling of cases involving common citizens, stating that the department has become a "cancer" for the poor people of Punjab.

title: On Camera, Woman Dragged On Road By Bike-Borne Mobile Snatchers
content: The incident took place in the New Kirti Nagar locality under the jurisdiction of Moti Nagar Police Station.

title: Tehran's 'Weapon-Grade Uranium Enrichment' Warning If US Attacks Iran Again
content: The UN watchdog believes that 440.9 kilograms (972 pounds) of Iran's stockpile is enriched up to 60 per cent purity, a short, technical step from weapons-grade levels of 90 per cent.

title: 9 Killed As Bomb Rigged To Rickshaw Explodes In Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
content: The attack took place in Lakki Marwat, a district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province, local police chief Azmat Ullah said. He said that two traffic police officers and a woman were among those killed.

title: "Business For Particular Gangs": Ashok Gehlot After NEET Exam Cancelled
content: The National Testing Agency (NTA) on Tuesday cancelled the NEET (UG) 2026 examination conducted on May 3, following approval from the Central government.

title: Delhi High Court Allows Eviction Of Slum Dwellers Near PM's Residence
content: Delhi High Court permits eviction of slum dwellers near PM residence with rehabilitation at Savda Ghevra.

title: Explained: How 'Heat Insurance' Can Help 76% Indians Exposed To Risk
content: As per NDMA, at least 23 states regularly see dangerously high temperatures. This underscores the emerging need for "heat insurance" in India.

title: "Will Arrest If Offence Proven": Cops On Sexual Abuse Case Against Bandi Sanjay's Son
content: The case relates to allegations made by a minor girl, following which Cyberabad police registered offences under the POCSO Act and relevant BNS sections.

title: No Fuel Price Hike In 4 Years, India Has Adequate Stocks: Hardeep Puri
content: "Let me tell you categorically, we have no supply side problems. The country has more than enough stocks of crude oil, LNG and LPG," he said.

title: Assam Chief Minister Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Himanta Sarma, 4 Ministers Sworn In
content: Assam Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Along with Himanta Biswa Sarma, four ministers - two from the BJP and one each from its allies Asom Gana Parishad (AGP) and Bodoland People's Front (BPF) - will also be sworn in.

title: Video: Handshakes And Smiles As MDMK Chief Vaiko's House Help Welcomes Vijay
content: Vijay received a warm welcome from MDMK leader Vaiko’s family members, including his son Durai Vaiko.

title: 10 Arrested For Stabbing Telangana Student To Death Over Love Affair Dispute
content: Among those arrested are the girl's father Narsimha Yadav, her uncles Mallesh Yadav and Srisailam Yadav, her brother Paramesh, and a juvenile. Police also arrested several others involved in the conspiracy and the attack.

title: Andhra Cops Fire 10 Warning Shots To Prevent Railway Signal Tampering
content: GRP personnel fired warning shots after suspects tried to tamper with railway signals near Nidubrolu.

title: Trump Weighs Two Iran War Options With Ceasefire "On Massive Life Support"
content: Trump wants a permanent peace deal to end the war, but officials said that Tehran's rejection of many of the US demands and refusal to make concessions regarding its nuclear programme has put the military option back on the table.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Edappadi Palaniswami, And The End Of His 'I, Me, Myself' Politics
content: Many in the party are no longer willing to put up with repeated failures the AIADMK has faced under Palaniswami.

title: Government Seals, Fake Signs: How Man Siphoned Off Rs 4 Crore In Kumbh Fraud
content: Accused Abhishek Jhare fabricated counterfeit work orders using the seals in the name of Nashik divisional commissioner Praveen Gedam.

title: Suvendu Adhikari, Bengal Lawmakers To Take Oaths In Assembly On May 13-14
content: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari and the newly-elected MLAs will take oaths as legislators over the course of two days.

title: Tamil Nadu politics LIVE: AIADMK reacts sharply to rebel MLAs, AMMK expels party's lone legislator
content: Ahead of the crucial floor test where TVK-led government is set to prove its majority in the Legislative Assembly and amid a split in AIADMK, AMMK's lone MLA S. Kamaraj announced that he would support the government, during his maiden speech in the Assembly.

title: Gandi Sri Veeranjaneya Swamy Temple reopens in Kadapa after renovation and consecration
content: Endowments Minister Anam Ramanarayana Reddy took part in the ‘Jeernoddharana Maha Kumbhabhishekam’ on Hanuman Jayanti

title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled LIVE: Nashik police take paper leak accused into custody
content: The cancellation of the NEET-UG 2026 examination, following an alleged question paper leak, has led to widespread political and student outrage across States

title: Six Indian fishermen arrested by Sri Lankan Navy; country boat seized
content: While they were fishing in the South Mannar region early on Tuesday, a patrolling team from the Sri Lankan Navy apprehended the fishermen, along with their boat, and escorted them to the Dikkowita Fishing Harbour

title: All parties’ opinions to be treated equally: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay during maiden Assembly speech
content: Mr. Vijay made these remarks while extending his greetings to the newly elected Speaker, J.C.D. Prabhakar, and Deputy Speaker, M. Ravisankar

title: Dhinakaran expels lone AMMK MLA over support to TVK
content: Earlier in the day, S. Kamaraj, while speaking in the Assembly to welcome the election of Assembly Speaker J.C.D. Prabhakar, extended his support to the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) government

title: Kerala CPI(M) leader P. Jayarajan says he visited Kodungalloor temple as part of research for book, not for darshan
content: He dismisses ‘misconceptions’ about communists' visit to places of worship. He says a chapter in his new book Sanathanikalude Hindutva Vazhikal examines non-Brahmanical ritual practices and Kodungalloor Kavu is one such important site

title: NEET-UG candidates in Tamil Nadu upset over exam cancellation
content: The uncertainty surrounding the release of new dates and procedures has also caused a stir among candidates

title: J.C.D. Prabhakar unanimously elected as Tamil Nadu Assembly Speaker
content: Describing CM Vijay as a “living MGR”, the Speaker said his election to the 17th Tamil Nadu Assembly was due to the TVK leader

title: Anti-drug drive won't yield results if liquor menace ignored: Mirwaiz
content: The Mirwaiz said the government could not justify taking action against one while remaining silent on the other

title: AIADMK faction led by C.Ve. Shanmugam declares support to TVK; says EPS wanted to be CM with DMK backing
content: We are no longer in any pre-poll alliance, says former Minister C.Ve. Shanmugam; it is believed of the total of 47 AIADMK legislators, 30 MLAs are with the group led by Mr. Shanmugam and S.P. Velumani.

title: Split wide open in AIADMK, MLAs are divided over support to Palaniswami
content: Churning in AIADMK becomes evident as two groups submit letter backing Palaniswami and former Minister Velumani for Leader of the Opposition

title: NEET-UG exam cancellation sparks anger in Kerala
content: V. Sivankutty, General Education Minister in the outgoing Left Democratic Front government, says the cancellation has caused severe mental and financial distress to students and parents.

title: Rani Kapur alleges ‘forced takeover’ bid in fresh plea before Supreme Court
content: The octogenarian has accused her daughter-in-law, Ms. Priya Kapur, of attempting to assume control over key companies and assets linked to the family estate despite an ongoing court-appointed mediation process

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: LDF terms Congress indecision over Chief Minister choice a mockery of democracy
content: The Congress party, through this indecisiveness, is disregarding the democratic verdict from the people, says T.P. Ramakrishnan. He says the LDF has no internal conflict over who should be the new Leader of the Opposition

title: Supreme Court to hear TVK MLA Sethupathi’s plea over trust vote on May 13
content: A High Court order, based on a petition filed by DMK’s K.R. Periakaruppan, who lost to Sethupathi by the margin of a single vote, restrains the TVK MLA from voting in the confidence motion scheduled to take place in the T.N. Assembly in less than the next 24 hours

title: Noida pizza shop owner arrested after video shows him spitting on dough, says police
content: Noida police said that they received information on May 10 regarding the video in which the shop owner is allegedly seen engaging in the inappropriate conduct while making a pizza

title: Supreme Court summons Kochi ACP over FIR delay
content: Complaint relates to outraging the modesty of a woman from a Scheduled category. The petitioner in the case is an accused in a case registered at the Panangad police station in Kochi on charges of assault and criminal trespass

title: Telugu officer takes charge as CPMG of Telangana Circle
content: D.S.V.R. Murthy, an officer of the 1998 batch of the Indian Postal Service (IPoS), has assumed charge as Chief Postmaster General of Telangana Circle on Tuesday

title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled: Sharmila asks Modi to take responsibility for ‘paper leak network’
content: Nearly 22 lakh students have been pushed into uncertainty by the cancellation, the AP Congress chief said

title: MLA-elect V. Muraleedharan slams delay in Kerala government formation, warns of governance vacuum
content: BJP leader V. Muraleedharan said the Congress leadership’s inability to select a Chief Minister, despite winning over 100 seats, reflected a deep organisational crisis and is one of the reasons why voters across the country were increasingly distancing themselves from the party

title: Chief Minister Vijay’s ‘Leo’-inspired cafe in Kashmir flooded with Tamil Nadu tourists
content: What did Chief Minister Vijay eat when he shot at Sifar Cafe in Anantnag while shooting for ‘Leo’? The answer is trout, say employees now catering to TN tourists who are flocking the cafe

title: Government General Hospital, Guntur: Fire in biochemistry lab, ceiling damaged; AC overload suspected
content: The fire damaged some materials and a portion of the ceiling but caused no casualties or damage to equipment

title: Suvendu Adhikari aide murder case: Accused's counsel hails CBI probe; mother says son framed
content: Advocate Harivansh Singh also accused the West Bengal Police of failing to adhere to legal procedure during the arrest of his client, Raj Singh

title: CBI nabs three in graft case linked to Punjab Vigilance; Opposition says AAP government’s anti-corruption crusade exposed as a sham
content: The opposition parties intensified their attack on the ruling Aam Aadmi Party government, asserting that the party’s much-touted anti-corruption crusade had been exposed as a sham

title: Vijay’s TVK seeks CPI’s support after Congress, CPI(M) outreach
content: Speaking to The Hindu, CPI State secretary M. Veerapandian said the party had received a letter from Mr. Vijay late on Tuesday (May 5, 2026) night, addressed to him, seeking the CPI’s support to form the government

title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled, fresh exam to be conducted following paper leak allegations
content: The revised examination dates and admit card release schedule will be communicated through the official channels of the National Testing Agency

title: DMK’s allies urge T.N. Governor to invite TVK chief Vijay to form government
content: “The BJP is using the Governor and taking a stand against the Constitution. That is why the Governor is delaying the opportunity for Mr. Vijay to form the government,” CPI(M) State secretary P. Shanmugam alleged

title: Governor should act according to the Constitution and invite TVK to form govt.: Arunraaj
content: The Supreme Court of India, in several judgments, has clearly said the majority should only be proved on the floor of the House, says TVK general secretary

title: Ensure adequate supply of drinking water during summer: T.N. CM Vijay instructs officials
content: The Chief Minister instructed officials to remove challenges in the supply of drinking water in all districts, as well as in the Greater Chennai Corporation (GCC), by employing lorries and through other means

title: Tamil Nadu government formation: After Semmalai, AIADMK MP Thambi Durai too says Palaniswami will come back to power
content: The AIADMK veteran said during the election tour of the general secretary, the public sentiment was evident in favour of his party’s return to power.

title: Edappadi Palaniswami’s group slams AIADMK rebels headed by C.Ve. Shanmugam
content: In a post on its social media handle (@AIADMKOfficial), the group contended that an “assembly” of those who could not register electoral success in their home districts was “dishing out a bundle of lies”

title: 126 MLAs-elect in T.N. have criminal cases pending against them; TVK tops list with 41
content: As many as 19 MLAs-elect from the TVK, 14 each from the AIADMK and the DMK, two each from the Congress and the PMK, and one each from the AMMK, the CPI, the DMDK, the IUML, and the VCK have declared that serious criminal cases were pending against them

title: Dhinakaran asks Vijay’s TVK to produce original letter of support claiming AMMK’s backing
content: Addressing a press conference, Mr. Dhinakaran reiterated that the letter in question and a video clip, displaying Mr. Kamaraj appending his signature on the letter, were all “forged”

title: VCK, IUML extend unconditional support to Vijay’s TVK; alliance with DMK intact, says Thirumavalavan
content: VCK chief Thol. Thirumavalavan said, “Our alliance within the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance will continue. As a political party, we have taken this decision by exercising our independent right. This will not affect our relationship with the DMK.”

title: Stalin urges new Tamil Nadu government to continue DMK regime’s schemes
content: He welcomes the statement of alliance partners that they will on with the Secular Progressive Alliance even though they have extended support to the TVK

title: Stalin reacts to Tamil Nadu CM Vijay speech: ‘Money is there; what is required is efficient administration’
content: Responding to Mr. Vijay’s claim that his electoral promises were practical, Mr. Stalin said the new Chief Minister had only just entered administration and would now learn the challenges involved in fulfilling promises.

title: Vande Mataram song during Vijay’s swearing-in ceremony: CPI questions relegation of Tamil Thaai Vaazhthu
content: Mr. Veerapandian said the Tamil invocation should be rendered first when newly-elected MLAs take oath, followed by the national anthem. “This practice should be followed in all government functions,” he added.

title: The emerging Rahul Gandhi-Vijay political partnership
content: If the TVK Government were to face a challenge from the Union Government, TVK president C. Joseph Vijay could find support from Congress

title: NEET 2026 re-examination is unfair on students, say educationalists in coastal Karnataka
content: Expert Group of Institutions Chairman Narendra Nayak demanded severe punishment not just to those who leaked the questions, but also those who enabled the leak

title: In Tamil Nadu Assembly, it’s Vijay versus Udhayanidhi
content: Belonging to a new generation of politicians, Mr. Udhayanidhi Stalin always wears jeans and a white T-shirt with a logo of the DMK’s youth wing, in departure from the traditional attire associated with Tamil Nadu politics. In that sense, he mirrors Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay, who appeared in a blazer and trousers for the swearing-in ceremony.

title: Dravidian parties got trapped in vicious cycle of cash-for-votes and corruption, says T.N. Minister Arunraj
content: “The Dravidian parties played a role in making T.N. a social justice State. But their initial idealism became diluted. They got trapped in a narrow path of corruption-ridden governance and family politics to such an extent that they couldn’t come out of it,” says the TVK leader

title: Congress claims Instagram blocked Rahul Gandhi's reel and photo post featuring Vijay due to MeitY rules
content: Sources in the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology clarified that it had nothing to do with the action and it was because the platform’s internal system mistakenly flagged the post for blocking

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly: from TVK Minister Keerthana not bringing election certificate to AIADMK MLA becoming emotional
content: With both formats of affirmation — swearing in the name of God as well as affirming by conscience — printed on the oath sheet, many members read out the entire text verbatim instead of choosing one.

title: Two killed as speeding KSRTC bus overturns into gorge on Bidar-Zaheerabad road
content: According to police, the driver lost control of the speeding bus near a sharp turn. The vehicle first crashed into the motorcycle before overturning into the roadside gorge

title: Thirumavalavan’s dilemma over Cabinet berth stirs debate in VCK
content: Party sources said while Mr. Thirumavalavan does not want to formally join the State Government, the party’s office bearers are urging him to rethink it

title: NEET-UG cancellation: PM’s ‘amrit kaal’ turned into ‘vish kaal’ for country, Rahul Gandhi slams Government
content: Rahul Gandhi said the hard work, sacrifices, and dreams of more than 22 lakh students have been "crushed by this corrupt BJP regime"

title: Malaysia, Tamil Nadu share deep ties, says PM Anwar Ibrahim; congratulates new Tamil Nadu CM Joseph Vijay
content: In a post on X, Anwar Ibrahim said that for many years, CM Vijay's "adoring fans watched him defeat corrupt politicians and assorted villains within three hours, usually after a short interval"

title: NSUI protests after NTA cancels NEET-UG 2026 over paper leak
content: NSUI said the cancellation of the examination itself proves that large-scale irregularities and serious lapses had taken place in the NEET examination process

title: The superpower trap: Xi, Trump, and the myth of American decline
content: The US president’s trademark bravado will be used to obscure the weakness of his position. The Chinese are unlikely to rub his nose in it. They know how to give face to foreign visitors, when convenient. The reality, however, is that it is Xi Jinping who “has the cards” — to use a phrase that Trump likes. US-Chinese competition is not zero-sum. One country’s loss is not necessarily the other’s gain. And today, both may be losing global influence at the same time.
